Pro Plan Sim-Funded and Live Account Highlights

November 11, 2025

At MyFundedFutures, we believe that a trader's career hinges on their ability to progress without compromise. Our goal is to support this progression from simulated funding stages to live funding stages, ensuring every trader has the opportunity to succeed.

Introducing the new Pro Plan at MyFundedFutures!

- The Main Objective: Transition to Live Funding

- Three Scale Plans to Choose From!

The Pro Plan is designed for experienced traders, offering frequent payout schedules and high maximum withdrawals. This article will break down each stage of the Pro plan. 

Looking for evaluation rules? Click here! 

- Benefits of the Pro Account

- Path to Live Funding

- No Daily Loss Limit

- Opportunity for Larger Payouts

- Competitive Pricing

Register for MFFU here.

- Live Account Transition

Our Pro Plan is designed to reward traders for consistent performance. The parameters for transitioning to a live account are dynamic and aim to provide greater payouts.

- Traders who achieve profits in excess of $100,000 maximum payout will have those excess profits moved to their live account balance up to the following amounts: 

- $50,000 account - $5,000

- $100,000 account - $7,500

- $150,000 account - $10,000

Traders may also request to allocate a portion of their payout to live account balance up to the live account funding max. 

Traders who consistently perform at a high level may be contacted by the risk team for a live transition at any time.

$50,000

$100,000

$150,000

Live Account Transition Triggers

- Achieve 3 consecutive payouts, or

- Excess profit above the $100,000 payout limit is transitioned to live up to $5,000

- Achieve 3 consecutive payouts, or

- Excess profit above the $100,000 payout limit is transitioned to live up to $7,500

- Achieve 3 consecutive payouts, or

- Excess profit above the $100,000 payout limit is transitioned to live up to $10,000

- Note: Reaching a $20,000 profit milestone will trigger an account for review but may not guarantee a transition to a Live account. 
​
Live traders may only request funds above their initial balance. 

- Unlocking your live allocation:

After completing 20 winning days, each day with a minimum profit of 4% of your initial balance and receiving 3 payouts, your initial balance is unlocked allowing you to withdraw from initial balance allocation down to a max of $140. 

Example: On a $5,000 allocation, achieving 20 days with at least $200 in profit and completing 3 payouts unlocks the initial $5,000 balance, allowing withdrawals down to $140. 
​
The risk team may contact you at any point during your Sim Funded journey for a transition to a Live account. Any profits on your account(s) will be transitioned, up to the max value per plan. Remaining profits are forfeited. 
​

Take the Challenge Now

Frequently Asked Question:

Q. Are there any consistency rules in the Pro Plan evaluation?

A. Yes, there is a 50% consistency rule in the evaluation phase of the Pro Plan and can be passed in as little as 2 days. 

Q. Is scaling rule present in the evaluation?

A. Scaling rules are not present in the evaluation. 

Q. Is there a Daily Loss Limit (DLL) on the Pro Plan?

A. No, there is no daily loss limit in the evaluation or sim funded stages of the Pro Plan. 

Q. Are there any buffer zones in the Pro Account payout policy?
A. Yes, trader cannot request first withdrawal until the account balance is above the starting balance plus the buffer amount. Buffer amounts are:
​
One-time withdrawal:

- Allowed before reaching full buffer zone. 

- Up to 60% of profits can be withdrawn, with a minimum of $1,000. 

- Remaining 40% remains for continued trading. 

- Payout buffer for 50k is $2,100

- Payout buffer for 100k is $3,100

- Payout buffer for 150k is $4,600

Q. Are there any activation fees on the Pro Plan? 
A. Our new Pro account does not have an activation fees.

Q. What's the minimum payout per request on the Pro Plan? 

A. The minimum payout amount on the Pro Plan is $1,000.

Q. Can I trade on live and sim at the same time? 

A. No, once you have a live account, you cannot trade on the sim and live environment simultaneously.
